summary: Find anchors corrected to use ds- prefix; verified by re-grep against live source. — Full detail and corrected proposal in EXP-261-overview-hero-rework-v2.json. Resolution path: decider applies EXP-261 patches → curmudgeon spot-check → on green, close ISS-1571 as fixed-by-EXP-261.
fix_summary: EXP-261 FC1 find now uses class="ds-scorecard ds-sc-hero" with ds-sc-card / ds-sc-number / ds-sc-label / ds-sc-sublabel throughout. EXP-261 FC2 find uses .ds-sc-domains{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr)} and .ds-verdict-bars{margin:1.5rem 0 2rem;padding:0;border:none}. Both anchors verified as byte-exact unique matches against current build-scripts/generate-html.js (lines 1441 and 550-551).
